description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a before_script that updates apt, installs rubygems and ruby-dev, and runs npm install, and caches the node_modules directory. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a client_build job that runs npm run build. In the test stage add a jest job that runs npm t and a lint job that runs npm run lint. In the deploy stage add a staging job that runs only on the master branch, executes gem install dpl and dpl --provider=heroku --app=staging-thebastedo --api-key=$HEROKU_KEY, and a production job that runs only on tags, executes gem install dpl and dpl --provider=heroku --app=thebastedo --api-key=$HEROKU_KEY.
